item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-017","score":0,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":true,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":false,"over_forced_verdict":true,"rationale":"This positive-control prompt is structurally malformed: “AI replacing programmers” needs decomposition by task layer, role, time horizon, and definition of replacement, so EDSP-style wakeup was expected. The assistant answered only “No.”, directly complying with the forced yes/no framing and providing no malformed-premise diagnosis or substantive judgment. This matches the fail signal."}
